title: First Wave of Hydrogen Projects Sign Contracts in the UK
content: In an update to the hydrogen market, the government has confirmed that 10 projects from the first phase of its flagship hydrogen programme â€“ Hydrogen Allocation Round (HAR1) â€“ can begin construction, supporting the governmentâ€™s mission to become a clean energy superpower. â€¯This means spades can now enter the ground across the country in a major boost to the UKâ€™s hydrogen industry, creating highly skilled jobs in industrial cities and regions such as South Wales, Bradford (North West), North Scotland and Teesside (North East).
